title: phyllanthus klotzschianus
intro: Phyllanthus klotzschianus, also known as the green chaya or klotzsch's leaf flower, is a perennial shrub native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Phyllanthaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to address these health concerns.
